title: Souls tangent
wikitext:
[]:             Quote Post by CitizenGeek » Tue Sep 25, 2007 1:43 pm TheAyanamiOtaku wrote: i want one with Yui looking up with a piece of Zeruel dangling from her mouth during the Zeruel Episode...

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Tue Sep 25, 2007 1:50 pm CitizenGeek wrote: Seriously, calling Unit01 'Yui' is just stating it like it is

[]:             Quote Post by TriLink » Tue Sep 25, 2007 1:54 pm Shouldn't we be calling Rei Lillith and Kaworu Adam then? Just typing out loud here. :P

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Tue Sep 25, 2007 2:01 pm TriLink12 wrote: Shouldn't we be calling Rei Lillith and Kaworu Adam then? Just typing out loud here. :P

[]:             Quote Post by BrikHaus » Tue Sep 25, 2007 7:47 pm Saying Yui instead of Eva-01 is just another way of discerning the Super Eva Nerds from the regular Eva Nerds.

[]:             Quote Post by CitizenGeek » Wed Sep 26, 2007 2:04 am Mr. Tines wrote: After all, the soul is the person.

[]:             Quote Post by BobBQ » Wed Sep 26, 2007 7:35 am CitizenGeek wrote: But, aren't Rei and Kaworu just made of the stuff (for want of a better way of putting it) that Adam and Lilith are made of? How is it possible that 'Lilith' is crucified in Central Dogma, but she's walking around and going to school a few floors up as well?

[]:             Quote Post by CitizenGeek » Wed Sep 26, 2007 10:30 am BobBQ wrote: The biomass of Adam and Lilith exist in Gendo's hand and the depths of Terminal Dogma respectively, while their souls attend school and do mysterious things in borrowed bodies.

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Wed Sep 26, 2007 11:07 am It seems there's many discussion threads that need to be revived otherwise there'd be stuff rehashed. Firstly, Rei doesn't know she's Lilith, not until Kaworu gives her the hint. Secondly, yes, the soul is salvaged into a soulless Rei in the tank. In the Evangelion Universe, souls are science (Metaphysical Biology, Fuytsuki's field), they can be manipulated.

[]:             Quote Post by DatDude » Wed Sep 26, 2007 6:12 pm The show just doesn't given us enough information about how souls work in the eva verse. CitizenGeek wrote: No, no - I think you're mistaken. It was actually Unit01 and not Yui Ikari that attacked Zeruel. Seriously, calling Unit01 'Yui' is just annoying :[

[]:             Quote Post by Anonymous_Evafan » Wed Sep 26, 2007 6:18 pm It was meant to be a mysterious aspect. But seriously, saying EVA-01 isn't Yui is the same as saying Kaworu isn't Adam. The soul makes the person not the body otherwise no one could come back after 3I.

[]:             Quote Post by SEELE 08 » Wed Sep 26, 2007 6:19 pm DatDude wrote: The show just doesn't given us enough information about how souls work in the eva verse. CitizenGeek wrote: No, no - I think you're mistaken. It was actually Unit01 and not Yui Ikari that attacked Zeruel. Seriously, calling Unit01 'Yui' is just annoying :[

[]:             Quote Post by Anonymous_Evafan » Wed Sep 26, 2007 6:22 pm Your certainly not suggesting Shinji made EVA-01 kick Zeruel's ass and eat the S^2 organ are you?

[]:             Quote Post by DatDude » Wed Sep 26, 2007 6:27 pm Anonymous_Evafan wrote: Your certainly not suggesting Shinji made EVA-01 kick Zeruel's ass and eat the S^2 organ are you?

[]:             Quote Post by Anonymous_Evafan » Wed Sep 26, 2007 6:29 pm Sure, Yui purposefully placed herself in the Eva because she'd be stuck there unable to do anything. It all makes sense now.

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Wed Sep 26, 2007 6:30 pm DatDude wrote: The show just doesn't given us enough information about how souls work in the eva verse.

[]:             Quote Post by TriLink » Wed Sep 26, 2007 6:40 pm Anonymous_Evafan wrote: Sure, Yui purposefully placed herself in the Eva because she'd be stuck there unable to do anything. It all makes sense now.

[]:             Quote Post by DatDude » Wed Sep 26, 2007 6:41 pm Ornette wrote: DatDude wrote: The show just doesn't given us enough information about how souls work in the eva verse.

[]:             Quote Post by Anonymous_Evafan » Wed Sep 26, 2007 6:49 pm TriLink12 wrote: Sorry, but I still don't buy the theory that Yui intentionally put her own soul in Sho for some divine purpose. Nobody has that much foresight. Contrary to popular belief, she's NOT God. But I think that once she was there, she made the best out of a bad situation and helped out where she could (see: Zeruel).

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Wed Sep 26, 2007 7:04 pm DatDude wrote: Maybe she built a weapon that could only work with a womans soul in the core and her child in the plug, knew it would be hypocrisy if she didn't go in herself . Naaa that makes to much sense and doesn't back up any idea of Reichus that can't be real.
summary:
[]:             Quote Post by CitizenGeek » Tue Sep 25, 2007 1:43 pm TheAyanamiOtaku wrote: i want one with Yui looking up with a piece of Zeruel dangling from her mouth during the Zeruel Episode...

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Tue Sep 25, 2007 1:50 pm CitizenGeek wrote: Seriously, calling Unit01 'Yui' is just stating it like it is

[]:     &nb
